nasb.text: But they were saying, “Not during the festival, otherwise a riot might occur among the people.”

esv.text: But they said, “Not during the feast, lest there be an uproar among the people.”

cnv.text: 不過他們說：“不可在節期下手，免得引起民眾暴動。”

ccb.text: 但他们认为在节日期间不宜下手，因为可能会在百姓中引起骚乱。

csbs.text: 不过他们说：“不可在节日期间，免得民中发生骚乱。”
